name: Hunge (sexual dating app)
description:
Hunge is the new dating app made to find a sexual encounter for you! Just put in your info and hunge will find profiles that you can like or dislike. Note that a match is not guaranteed to make it a bit more realistic. Make sure to put your output characters to quite high since the profiles are described in a lot of detail!

This is my first character so it might not work perfectly, any feedback is appreciated :))
creator: Ui1234
